title: acronia portillae
side_effects: Acronia portillae can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and stomach discomfort due to its high alkaloid content. Prolonged exposure to its toxic compounds may also lead to kidney damage and impaired liver function in some individuals. In extreme cases, excessive consumption of the plant has been known to cause seizures, convulsions, and even respiratory failure. It is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using any products derived from the Acronia portillae plant to avoid these potential side effects.
